headline: NYLI CBRE Global Infrastructure Megatrends Term Fund (NYSE: MEGI) Declares Availability of Section 19(a) Notice for April 2026
summary: NEW YORK, April 14, 2026--NYLI CBRE Global Infrastructure Megatrends Term Fund (the "Fund") (NYSE: MEGI) today announced the availability of the Section 19(a) notice for April 2026. The Fund’s current annualized distribution rate is 9.84% based upon the closing price of $15.25 on April 9, 2026, and 8.71% based upon the Fund’s closing NAV of $17.23 as of the same date. The distribution schedule for the fund can be found here.

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on CBRE Group, Raises Price Target to $175
summary: Barclays  analyst Brendan Lynch   maintains CBRE Group (NYSE:CBRE) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $174 to $175.

headline: Citigroup, Morgan Stanley, CBRE Group And More On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
summary: Experts predict higher stock prices for CBRE Group and Morgan Stanley, while State Street SPDR S&P Biotech ETF and Citigroup are recommended.
